TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: pai patsuni tu aitsu imaza itua kai nua Tsemas.
S.PHON: pai pa ¶uni tu ai ¶u imaza itua kai nua ¶…ômas.
S.FORM: pai pacuni tu aicu imaza itua kai nua Cemas.
S.PHON: pai pa ¶uni tu ai ¶u imaza itua kai nua ¶…ômas.
S.TRANSL: Let us look at this passage here in the word of God.

S.FORM: aitsu a vetsik imaza, ki…ęivaku tua nu …ęaqediqedi, aya.
S.PHON: ai ¶u a v…ô ¶ik imaza, ki éivaku tua nu éaq…ôdiq…ôdi, aja.
S.FORM: aicu a vecik imaza, kiljivaku tua nu ljaqediqedi, aya.
S.PHON: ai ¶u a v…ô ¶ik imaza, ki éivaku tua nu éaq…ôdiq…ôdi, aja.
S.TRANSL: This writing here says Love your neighbours.

S.FORM: pai izua zua maqatsuvutsuvung vaik a sema zua i tjai Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: pai izua zua maqa ¶uvu ¶uvuŇč vaik a s…ôma zua i cai jisu-sama.
S.FORM: pai izua zua maqacuvucuvung vaik a sema zua i tjai Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: pai izua zua maqa ¶uvu ¶uvuŇč vaik a s…ôma zua i ¶ai jisu-sama.
S.TRANSL: Now there was a young person who went to Jesus.

S.FORM: "tima mana ku …ęaqediqedi?" aya kivadaq timadju.
S.PHON: "tima mana ku éaq…ôdiq…ôdi" aja kivadaq tima…Ču.
S.FORM: "tima mana ku ljaqediqedi?" aya kivadaq timadju.
S.PHON: "tima mana ku éaq…ôdiq…ôdi" aja kivadaq tima…Ču.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWho is my neighbour?‚ÄĚ he asked.

S.FORM: manu tevelain ni Yisu-sama: "pai ku su pasemalavay.
S.PHON: manu t…ôv…ô…≠ain ni jisu-sama: "pai ku su pas…ôma…≠avaj.
S.FORM: manu tevelain ni Yisu-sama: "pai ku su pasemalavay.
S.PHON: manu t…ôv…ô…≠ain ni jisu-sama: "pai ku su pas…ôma…≠avaj.
S.TRANSL: And Jesus replied: ‚ÄúI will tell you.

S.FORM: izua zua matsidi…ę a nakemasi zua i Yirusa…ęim a pasa Yiriku a patje…ęelauz.
S.PHON: izua zua ma ¶idi é a nak…ômasi zua i jirusa éim a pasa jiriku a pac…ô é…ô…≠auz.
S.FORM: izua zua macidilj a nakemasi zua i Yirusaljim a pasa Yiriku a patjeljelauz.
S.PHON: izua zua ma ¶idi é a nak…ômasi zua i jirusa éim a pasa jiriku a pa ¶…ô é…ô…≠auz.
S.TRANSL: There was a person who went down from Jerusalem towards Jericho.

S.FORM: manu setsevung tua za tsaŠłć.
S.PHON: manu s…ô ¶…ôvuŇč tua za ¶a…Ė.
S.FORM: manu secevung tua za cadr.
S.PHON: manu s…ô ¶…ôvuŇč tua za ¶a…Ė.
S.TRANSL: And he met some robbers.

S.FORM: qau azua tsaŠłć kirimuin a djemukul timadju, sa uri papatsayi, sa sukava-i timadju, sa paseqerengi, sa alapi aza nanemanemanga, sa vaikan.
S.PHON: qau azua ¶a…Ė kirimuin a …Č…ômuku…≠ tima…Ču, sa uri papa ¶aji, sa sukava-i tima…Ču, sa pas…ôq…ôr…ôŇči, sa a…≠api aza nan…ôman…ômaŇča, sa vaikan.
S.FORM: qau azua cadr kirimuin a djemukul timadju, sa uri papacayi, sa sukava-i timadju, sa paseqerengi, sa alapi aza nanemanemanga, sa vaikan.
S.PHON: qau azua ¶a…Ė kirimuin a …Č…ômuku…≠ tima…Ču, sa uri papa ¶aji, sa sukava-i tima…Ču, sa pas…ôq…ôr…ôŇči, sa a…≠api aza nan…ôman…ômaŇča, sa vaikan.
S.TRANSL: And the robbers quickly beat him up, and were going to kill him, and took off his clothes and knocked him over and took everything, and left him.

S.FORM: qau pai ka naseqereng anga azua matsidi…ę, tsemalivat azua kisamu…ęamu…ęa i tsakar.
S.PHON: qau pai ka nas…ôq…ôr…ôŇč aŇča azua ma ¶idi é, ¶…ôma…≠ivat azua kisamu éamu éa i ¶akar.
S.FORM: qau pai ka naseqereng anga azua macidilj, cemalivat azua kisamuljamulja i cakar.
S.PHON: qau pai ka nas…ôq…ôr…ôŇč aŇča azua ma ¶idi é, ¶…ôma…≠ivat azua kisamu éamu éa i ¶akar.
S.TRANSL: And as the man was lying there, a person who worked hard at the shrine passed by.

S.FORM: manu inika pinatsunan.
S.PHON: manu inika pina ¶unan.
S.FORM: manu inika pinacunan.
S.PHON: manu inika pina ¶unan.
S.TRANSL: He didn‚Äôt look at him;

S.FORM: vaik sakamaya timadju a lemagaw a pasulivay tsemalivat.
S.PHON: vaik sakamaja tima…Ču a …≠…ômagaw a pasu…≠ivaj ¶…ôma…≠ivat.
S.FORM: vaik sakamaya timadju a lemagaw a pasulivay cemalivat.
S.PHON: vaik sakamaja tima…Ču a …≠…ômagaw a pasu…≠ivaj ¶…ôma…≠ivat.
S.TRANSL: he just made a detour and ignored him and passed on.

S.FORM: mangtjez uta a se ‚ĪĘibi a tsautsau; manu patsunan aza naseqereng.
S.PHON: maŇčc…ôz uta a s…ô éibi a ¶au ¶au; manu pa ¶unan aza nas…ôq…ôr…ôŇč.
S.FORM: mangtjez uta a se Ljibi a caucau; manu pacunan aza naseqereng.
S.PHON: maŇč ¶…ôz uta a s…ô éibi a ¶au ¶au; manu pa ¶unan aza nas…ôq…ôr…ôŇč.
S.TRANSL: A person from Levi also came. He looked at the person lying there,

S.FORM: lagavan uta nimadju, sa vaik.
S.PHON: …≠agavan uta nima…Ču, sa vaik.
S.FORM: lagavan uta nimadju, sa vaik.
S.PHON: …≠agavan uta nima…Ču, sa vaik.
S.TRANSL: and also made a detour and went.

S.FORM: mangtjez anga a sika masan tjelu…ę a se Samalia a nanguaq aravats a tsautsau.
S.PHON: maŇčc…ôz aŇča a sika masan c…ô…≠u é a s…ô sama…≠ia a naŇčuaq arava ¶ a ¶au ¶au.
S.FORM: mangtjez anga a sika masan tjelulj a se Samalia a nanguaq aravac a caucau.
S.PHON: maŇč ¶…ôz aŇča a sika masan ¶…ô…≠u é a s…ô sama…≠ia a naŇčuaq arava ¶ a ¶au ¶au.
S.TRANSL: The third person to come was a very good person from Samaria.

S.FORM: …ęeteku anga timadju taza kinavavavan a lakuda, sa sazua-i anga patsun aza naseqereng, sa alapan anga tua tsemel nimadju, sa putsemeli, sa tsavu-i anga aza mareka piqay.
S.PHON: é…ôt…ôku aŇča tima…Ču taza kinavavavan a …≠akuda, sa sazua-i aŇča pa ¶un aza nas…ôq…ôr…ôŇč, sa a…≠apan aŇča tua ¶…ôm…ô…≠ nima…Ču, sa pu ¶…ôm…ô…≠i, sa ¶avu-i aŇča aza mar…ôka piqaj.
S.FORM: ljeteku anga timadju taza kinavavavan a lakuda, sa sazua-i anga pacun aza naseqereng, sa alapan anga tua cemel nimadju, sa pucemeli, sa cavu-i anga aza mareka piqay.
S.PHON: é…ôt…ôku aŇča tima…Ču taza kinavavavan a …≠akuda, sa sazua-i aŇča pa ¶un aza nas…ôq…ôr…ôŇč, sa a…≠apan aŇča tua ¶…ôm…ô…≠ nima…Ču, sa pu ¶…ôm…ô…≠i, sa ¶avu-i aŇča aza mar…ôka piqaj.
S.TRANSL: He got down from the camel he was riding, and went and looked at the person lying there, and got out his medicines and applied them to him, and bandaged the wounds.

S.FORM: pai sa tsatsu…ęu-i anga a pasa vavaw tua lakuda nimadju, sa vaikan anga pasa kakasiu…ęayan.
S.PHON: pai sa ¶a ¶u éu-i aŇča a pasa vavaw tua …≠akuda nima…Ču, sa vaikan aŇča pasa kakasiu éajan.
S.FORM: pai sa caculju-i anga a pasa vavaw tua lakuda nimadju, sa vaikan anga pasa kakasiuljayan.
S.PHON: pai sa ¶a ¶u éu-i aŇča a pasa vavaw tua …≠akuda nima…Ču, sa vaikan aŇča pasa kakasiu éajan.
S.TRANSL: Then he put him on his camel, and went off with him to the inn.

S.FORM: qau pai ka izua i kakasiu…ęayan, 'uza a paisu manu uri sikasiu…ęay nusa tiza.
S.PHON: qau pai ka izua i kakasiu éajan, 'uza a paisu manu uri sikasiu éaj nusa tiza.
S.FORM: qau pai ka izua i kakasiuljayan, 'uza a paisu manu uri sikasiuljay nusa tiza.
S.PHON: qau pai ka izua i kakasiu éajan, Ēuza a paisu manu uri sikasiu éaj nusa tiza.
S.TRANSL: And when he was there at the inn the person from Samaria said (to them): ‚ÄėHere is some money to pay for this person‚Äôs stay.

S.FORM: nu inika kamseng, ku vayi anga uta nutiaw,' ayain nua zua se Samalia a tsautsau.
S.PHON: nu inika kams…ôŇč, ku vaji aŇča uta nutiaw,' ajain nua zua s…ô sama…≠ia a ¶au ¶au.
S.FORM: nu inika kamseng, ku vayi anga uta nutiaw,' ayain nua zua se Samalia a caucau.
S.PHON: nu inika kams…ôŇč, ku vaji aŇča uta nutiaw, Ē ajain nua zua s…ô sama…≠ia a ¶au ¶au.
S.TRANSL: If it isn‚Äôt enough, I‚Äôll give more tomorrow.‚Äô

S.FORM: qau pai tisun," ayatutsuin ni Yisu-sama aza maqatsuvutsuvung, "manu inu mana naki…ęivak tua …ęaqediqedi?" ayain.
S.PHON: qau pai tisun," ajatu ¶uin ni jisu-sama aza maqa ¶uvu ¶uvuŇč, "manu inu mana naki éivak tua éaq…ôdiq…ôdi" ajain.
S.FORM: qau pai tisun," ayatucuin ni Yisu-sama aza maqacuvucuvung, "manu inu mana nakiljivak tua ljaqediqedi?" ayain.
S.PHON: qau pai tisun," ajatu ¶uin ni jisu-sama aza maqa ¶uvu ¶uvuŇč, "manu inu mana naki éivak tua éaq…ôdiq…ôdi" ajain.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúNow as for you,‚ÄĚ said Jesus to the young person, ‚Äúwhich one loved his neighbour?‚ÄĚ he said.

S.FORM: "mavan aza sika masan tjelu…ę mana naki…ęivak tua …ęaqediqedi a napaseqe…ęing," aya a temvela.
S.PHON: "mavan aza sika masan c…ô…≠u é mana naki éivak tua éaq…ôdiq…ôdi a napas…ôq…ô éiŇč," aja a t…ômv…ô…≠a.
S.FORM: "mavan aza sika masan tjelulj mana nakiljivak tua ljaqediqedi a napaseqeljing," aya a temvela.
S.PHON: "mavan aza sika masan ¶…ô…≠u é mana naki éivak tua éaq…ôdiq…ôdi a napas…ôq…ô éiŇč," aja a t…ômv…ô…≠a.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúIt was the third one, who showed love to his neighbour and saved him,‚ÄĚ he replied.

S.FORM: "qau pai tisun sa-u aitaza-u uta, ki…ęivaku tua su …ęaqediqedi," ayain anga ni Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: "qau pai tisun sa-u aitaza-u uta, ki éivaku tua su éaq…ôdiq…ôdi," ajain aŇča ni jisu-sama.
S.FORM: "qau pai tisun sa-u aitaza-u uta, kiljivaku tua su ljaqediqedi," ayain anga ni Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: "qau pai tisun sa-u aitaza-u uta, ki éivaku tua su éaq…ôdiq…ôdi," ajain aŇča ni jisu-sama.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWell you go and do the same; love your neighbours,‚ÄĚJesus said to him.

S.FORM: pai aitsu nu kinemnem itjen a mapu…ęat, aitsu a …ęaqediqedi nu aya, aitsu a ti Yisu, inika manu amin a kipalingu…ę tua tja umaq, inika amin a mareka tja qali a mareka tja kaka nu siayaya.
S.PHON: pai ai ¶u nu kin…ômn…ôm ic…ôn a mapu éat, ai ¶u a éaq…ôdiq…ôdi nu aja, ai ¶u a ti jisu, inika manu amin a kipa…≠iŇču é tua ca umaq, inika amin a mar…ôka ca qa…≠i a mar…ôka ca kaka nu siajaja.
S.FORM: pai aicu nu kinemnem itjen a mapuljat, aicu a ljaqediqedi nu aya, aicu a ti Yisu, inika manu amin a kipalingulj tua tja umaq, inika amin a mareka tja qali a mareka tja kaka nu siayaya.
S.PHON: pai ai ¶u nu kin…ômn…ôm i ¶…ôn a mapu éat, ai ¶u a éaq…ôdiq…ôdi nu aja, ai ¶u a ti jisu, inika manu amin a kipa…≠iŇču é tua ¶a umaq, inika amin a mar…ôka ¶a qa…≠i a mar…ôka ¶a kaka nu siajaja.
S.TRANSL: Now when we all think about this, when we say neighbour, as for Jesus, it means not only those living round our house, not only our friends or our siblings.

S.FORM: aitsu a imaza i katsauan a mapu…ęat, a senema a senema, nuka tsadja aravats, tjara tja …ęaqediqedi a mapu…ęat.
S.PHON: ai ¶u a imaza i ka ¶auan a mapu éat, a s…ôn…ôma a s…ôn…ôma, nuka ¶a…Ča arava ¶, cara ca éaq…ôdiq…ôdi a mapu éat.
S.FORM: aicu a imaza i kacauan a mapuljat, a senema a senema, nuka cadja aravac, tjara tja ljaqediqedi a mapuljat.
S.PHON: ai ¶u a imaza i ka ¶auan a mapu éat, a s…ôn…ôma a s…ôn…ôma, nuka ¶a…Ča arava ¶, ¶ara ¶a éaq…ôdiq…ôdi a mapu éat.
S.TRANSL: All the people here in the world, from here or there, even those a long way off, they are certainly all our neighbours.

S.FORM: saka titjen a mapu…ęat, aitsu imaza i katsauan a mapu…ęat nia …ęaqediqedi, aya-i a mapu…ęat.
S.PHON: saka tic…ôn a mapu éat, ai ¶u imaza i ka ¶auan a mapu éat nia éaq…ôdiq…ôdi, aja-i a mapu éat.
S.FORM: saka titjen a mapuljat, aicu imaza i kacauan a mapuljat nia ljaqediqedi, aya-i a mapuljat.
S.PHON: saka ti ¶…ôn a mapu éat, ai ¶u imaza i ka ¶auan a mapu éat nia éaq…ôdiq…ôdi, aja-i a mapu éat.
S.TRANSL: So all of us let us all recognise that all the people in the world are our neighbours.

S.FORM: nu setsevung itjen tua selapalapay, nu setsevung itjen tua qemauqaung, nu setsevung itjen tua nasemalimsim, tja paseqe…ęingaw tja tjiakaw tja pakava…ęutaw.
S.PHON: nu s…ô ¶…ôvuŇč ic…ôn tua s…ô…≠apa…≠apaj, nu s…ô ¶…ôvuŇč ic…ôn tua q…ômauqauŇč, nu s…ô ¶…ôvuŇč ic…ôn tua nas…ôma…≠imsim, ca pas…ôq…ô éiŇčaw ca ciakaw ca pakava éutaw.
S.FORM: nu secevung itjen tua selapalapay, nu secevung itjen tua qemauqaung, nu secevung itjen tua nasemalimsim, tja paseqeljingaw tja tjiakaw tja pakavaljutaw.
S.PHON: nu s…ô ¶…ôvuŇč i ¶…ôn tua s…ô…≠apa…≠apaj, nu s…ô ¶…ôvuŇč i ¶…ôn tua q…ômauqauŇč, nu s…ô ¶…ôvuŇč i ¶…ôn tua nas…ôma…≠imsim, ¶a pas…ôq…ô éiŇčaw ¶a ¶iakaw ¶a pakava éutaw.
S.TRANSL: If we meet those who are suffering, if we meet those who are crying, if we meet those who are in trouble, let us save, lead and help them.

S.FORM: aitsu a ini anan ka seke…ęang tua kai nua Tsemas, tja tjiakaw a pasa tjaiqayaw tjai Yisu-sama, u…ęa namapaseqe…ęing tiamadju.
S.PHON: ai ¶u a ini anan ka s…ôk…ô éaŇč tua kai nua ¶…ômas, ca ciakaw a pasa caiqajaw cai jisu-sama, u éa namapas…ôq…ô éiŇč tiama…Ču.
S.FORM: aicu a ini anan ka sekeljang tua kai nua Cemas, tja tjiakaw a pasa tjaiqayaw tjai Yisu-sama, ulja namapaseqeljing tiamadju.
S.PHON: ai ¶u a ini anan ka s…ôk…ô éaŇč tua kai nua ¶…ômas, ¶a ¶iakaw a pasa ¶aiqajaw ¶ai jisu-sama, u éa namapas…ôq…ô éiŇč tiama…Ču.
S.TRANSL: Let us lead to Jesus those who do not yet know the word of God, so that they may be saved.

S.FORM: nu namayatutsu itjen mana uri napasusu itjen tua kai ni Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: nu namajatu ¶u ic…ôn mana uri napasusu ic…ôn tua kai ni jisu-sama.
S.FORM: nu namayatucu itjen mana uri napasusu itjen tua kai ni Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: nu namajatu ¶u i ¶…ôn mana uri napasusu i ¶…ôn tua kai ni jisu-sama.
S.TRANSL: If we do this we will fulfil the words of Jesus.

S.FORM: ki…ęivaku tua su …ęaqediqedi, aya tjanuitjen a mapu…ęat.
S.PHON: ki éivaku tua su éaq…ôdiq…ôdi, aja canuic…ôn a mapu éat.
S.FORM: kiljivaku tua su ljaqediqedi, aya tjanuitjen a mapuljat.
S.PHON: ki éivaku tua su éaq…ôdiq…ôdi, aja ¶anui ¶…ôn a mapu éat.
S.TRANSL: Love your neighbours, he says to us all.

S.FORM: amin.
S.PHON: amin.
S.FORM: amin.
S.PHON: amin.
S.TRANSL: The end.

S.FORM: pai anema nia sitjuma…ę tjanusun a naqemati a Tsemas, tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama?
S.PHON: pai an…ôma nia sicuma é canusun a naq…ômati a ¶…ômas, canusun a ti jisu-sama
S.FORM: pai anema nia sitjumalj tjanusun a naqemati a Cemas, tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama?
S.PHON: pai an…ôma nia si ¶uma é ¶anusun a naq…ômati a ¶…ômas, ¶anusun a ti jisu-sama
S.TRANSL: What are we to say to you, Creator God, to you, Jesus?

S.FORM: ma…ęima…ęi aravats a su zukerin anga men a imaza i katsalisian, sa su kana paseqe…ęiqe…ęing anga tjanuamen.
S.PHON: ma éima éi arava ¶ a su zuk…ôrin aŇča m…ôn a imaza i ka ¶a…≠isian, sa su kana pas…ôq…ô éiq…ô éiŇč aŇča canuam…ôn.
S.FORM: maljimalji aravac a su zukerin anga men a imaza i kacalisian, sa su kana paseqeljiqeljing anga tjanuamen.
S.PHON: ma éima éi arava ¶ a su zuk…ôrin aŇča m…ôn a imaza i ka ¶a…≠isian, sa su kana pas…ôq…ô éiq…ô éiŇč aŇča ¶anuam…ôn.
S.TRANSL: Thank you very much for your reaching us here the people of the mountains and saving us.

S.FORM: anemanan nia sitjuma…ę tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama?
S.PHON: an…ômanan nia sicuma é canusun a ti jisu-sama
S.FORM: anemanan nia sitjumalj tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama?
S.PHON: an…ômanan nia si ¶uma é ¶anusun a ti jisu-sama
S.TRANSL: And what are we to say to you, Jesus?

S.FORM: pai aitsu a nasepasalisaliw a tiamen su ruram-en amen sa su pake…ęangi amen ta uri nia pakazuanan.
S.PHON: pai ai ¶u a nas…ôpasa…≠isa…≠iw a tiam…ôn su ruram-…ôn am…ôn sa su pak…ô éaŇči am…ôn ta uri nia pakazuanan.
S.FORM: pai aicu a nasepasalisaliw a tiamen su ruram-en amen sa su pakeljangi amen ta uri nia pakazuanan.
S.PHON: pai ai ¶u a nas…ôpasa…≠isa…≠iw a tiam…ôn su ruram-…ôn am…ôn sa su pak…ô éaŇči am…ôn ta uri nia pakazuanan.
S.TRANSL: You have come to(?) us who had sinned, and you have taught us the way we should go.

S.FORM: anema nia sitjuma…ę?
S.PHON: an…ôma nia sicuma é
S.FORM: anema nia sitjumalj?
S.PHON: an…ôma nia si ¶uma é
S.TRANSL: What are we to say?

S.FORM: pai, Yisu-sama, aitsu a mareka imaza i gadu a mareka tja kaka a katsalisian a namavilivili…ę a namavavutuvutu a sitsuayan, pai aitsu su …ęaluayi anga men sa su tjautsikeli anga men ta uri nia sikatsaquan a maqaqe…ęiqe…ęing a mareka kaka.
S.PHON: pai, jisu-sama, ai ¶u a mar…ôka imaza i gadu a mar…ôka ca kaka a ka ¶a…≠isian a namavi…≠ivi…≠i é a namavavutuvutu a si ¶uajan, pai ai ¶u su éa…≠uaji aŇča m…ôn sa su cau ¶ik…ô…≠i aŇča m…ôn ta uri nia sika ¶aquan a maqaq…ô éiq…ô éiŇč a mar…ôka kaka.
S.FORM: pai, Yisu-sama, aicu a mareka imaza i gadu a mareka tja kaka a kacalisian a namavilivililj a namavavutuvutu a sicuayan, pai aicu su ljaluayi anga men sa su tjaucikeli anga men ta uri nia sikacaquan a maqaqeljiqeljing a mareka kaka.
S.PHON: pai, jisu-sama, ai ¶u a mar…ôka imaza i gadu a mar…ôka ¶a kaka a ka ¶a…≠isian a namavi…≠ivi…≠i é a namavavutuvutu a si ¶uajan, pai ai ¶u su éa…≠uaji aŇča m…ôn sa su ¶au ¶ik…ô…≠i aŇča m…ôn ta uri nia sika ¶aquan a maqaq…ô éiq…ô éiŇč a mar…ôka kaka.
S.TRANSL: We and our brothers and sisters here in the mountains, mountain people who were uncivilised and at enmity with one another in times past, you have made it clear to us and have told us how we should be able to help one another as brothers and sisters.

S.FORM: saka pai aitsu nuka men a matsadjatsadja, nuka namaqaqetsiqetsi a nia matja…ęa…ęak, u…ęa nia vetjek anga a mapu…ęat.
S.PHON: saka pai ai ¶u nuka m…ôn a ma ¶a…Ča ¶a…Ča, nuka namaqaq…ô ¶iq…ô ¶i a nia maca éa éak, u éa nia v…ôc…ôk aŇča a mapu éat.
S.FORM: saka pai aicu nuka men a macadjacadja, nuka namaqaqeciqeci a nia matjaljaljak, ulja nia vetjek anga a mapuljat.
S.PHON: saka pai ai ¶u nuka m…ôn a ma ¶a…Ča ¶a…Ča, nuka namaqaq…ô ¶iq…ô ¶i a nia ma ¶a éa éak, u éa nia v…ô ¶…ôk aŇča a mapu éat.
S.TRANSL: And so even though our parents lived far apart and fought one another, they are all to be our brothers and sisters.

S.FORM: nu nakisusu anga men, nu napasusu anga men ta su pazazekazekatj, u…ęa men a natjemiatjiak anga sema tjaiqayaw sakamaya tjanusun.
S.PHON: nu nakisusu aŇča m…ôn, nu napasusu aŇča m…ôn ta su pazaz…ôkaz…ôkac, u éa m…ôn a nac…ômiaciak aŇča s…ôma caiqajaw sakamaja canusun.
S.FORM: nu nakisusu anga men, nu napasusu anga men ta su pazazekazekatj, ulja men a natjemiatjiak anga sema tjaiqayaw sakamaya tjanusun.
S.PHON: nu nakisusu aŇča m…ôn, nu napasusu aŇča m…ôn ta su pazaz…ôkaz…ôka ¶, u éa m…ôn a na ¶…ômia ¶iak aŇča s…ôma ¶aiqajaw sakamaja ¶anusun.
S.TRANSL: When we have become followers and fulfil your commands, may we lead them all to you.

S.FORM: pai u…ęa men a pitjakem…ęam…ęang anga, u…ęa men a nakikakezeng anga sakamaya tjanusun.
S.PHON: pai u éa m…ôn a picak…ôm éam éaŇč aŇča, u éa m…ôn a nakikak…ôz…ôŇč aŇča sakamaja canusun.
S.FORM: pai ulja men a pitjakemljamljang anga, ulja men a nakikakezeng anga sakamaya tjanusun.
S.PHON: pai u éa m…ôn a pi ¶ak…ôm éam éaŇč aŇča, u éa m…ôn a nakikak…ôz…ôŇč aŇča sakamaja ¶anusun.
S.TRANSL: May we understand better, may we stand firm in reliance on you alone.

S.FORM: tisun a naqemati a Tsemas, naqemati a Tsemas a naki…ęivak tjanuamen a napasa maza i katsauan, u…ęa men a nayayanga sakamaya; saka mareka vetjevetjek itjen, u…ęa men a naya.
S.PHON: tisun a naq…ômati a ¶…ômas, naq…ômati a ¶…ômas a naki éivak canuam…ôn a napasa maza i ka ¶auan, u éa m…ôn a najajaŇča sakamaja; saka mar…ôka v…ôc…ôv…ôc…ôk ic…ôn, u éa m…ôn a naja.
S.FORM: tisun a naqemati a Cemas, naqemati a Cemas a nakiljivak tjanuamen a napasa maza i kacauan, ulja men a nayayanga sakamaya; saka mareka vetjevetjek itjen, ulja men a naya.
S.PHON: tisun a naq…ômati a ¶…ômas, naq…ômati a ¶…ômas a naki éivak ¶anuam…ôn a napasa maza i ka ¶auan, u éa m…ôn a najajaŇča sakamaja; saka mar…ôka v…ô ¶…ôv…ô ¶…ôk i ¶…ôn, u éa m…ôn a naja.
S.TRANSL: You are the creator God, the creator God who loved us and came here to the world, is what we should say; and we should say that we are all brothers and sisters;

S.FORM: u…ęa ika men a nasemanvili…ę.
S.PHON: u éa ika m…ôn a nas…ômanvi…≠i é.
S.FORM: ulja ika men a nasemanvililj.
S.PHON: u éa ika m…ôn a nas…ômanvi…≠i é.
S.TRANSL: so that we don‚Äôt hate anyone,

S.FORM: kuma…ęi a na nia vutu, u…ęa nia tjiaken sakamaya.
S.PHON: kuma éi a na nia vutu, u éa nia ciak…ôn sakamaja.
S.FORM: kumalji a na nia vutu, ulja nia tjiaken sakamaya.
S.PHON: kuma éi a na nia vutu, u éa nia ¶iak…ôn sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: even those who were our enemies, and so that we only lead them on.

S.FORM: ayatutsu-i, u…ęa tjen a sema tjaiqayaw tjai Yisu-sama u…ęa namapaseqe…ęing.
S.PHON: ajatu ¶u-i, u éa c…ôn a s…ôma caiqajaw cai jisu-sama u éa namapas…ôq…ô éiŇč.
S.FORM: ayatucu-i, ulja tjen a sema tjaiqayaw tjai Yisu-sama ulja namapaseqeljing.
S.PHON: ajatu ¶u-i, u éa ¶…ôn a s…ôma ¶aiqajaw ¶ai jisu-sama u éa namapas…ôq…ô éiŇč.
S.TRANSL: Let us say this, so that we may come to Jesus so that we may be saved;

S.FORM: u…ęa vaik a semusu tua sinan djalan ni Yisu-sama a tja tamasi, u…ęa men a nayanga sakamaya marepaqaqe…ęiqe…ęing, nu izua uri matsay i kadjalanan, nu izua matsu…ęatsu…ęa, aya ti Yisu-sama tazua tulu tjanuitjen.
S.PHON: u éa vaik a s…ômusu tua sinan …Ča…≠an ni jisu-sama a ca tamasi, u éa m…ôn a najaŇča sakamaja mar…ôpaqaq…ô éiq…ô éiŇč, nu izua uri ma ¶aj i ka…Ča…≠anan, nu izua ma ¶u éa ¶u éa, aja ti jisu-sama tazua tu…≠u canuic…ôn.
S.FORM: ulja vaik a semusu tua sinan djalan ni Yisu-sama a tja tamasi, ulja men a nayanga sakamaya marepaqaqeljiqeljing, nu izua uri macay i kadjalanan, nu izua maculjaculja, aya ti Yisu-sama tazua tulu tjanuitjen.
S.PHON: u éa vaik a s…ômusu tua sinan …Ča…≠an ni jisu-sama a ¶a tamasi, u éa m…ôn a najaŇča sakamaja mar…ôpaqaq…ô éiq…ô éiŇč, nu izua uri ma ¶aj i ka…Ča…≠anan, nu izua ma ¶u éa ¶u éa, aja ti jisu-sama tazua tu…≠u ¶anui ¶…ôn.
S.TRANSL: so that our souls may follow the way opened by Jesus, let us say and help one another. If there is someone dying at the roadside, if are there people hungry, says Jesus in his teaching for us,

S.FORM: parepaseqe…ęiqe…ęingi, u…ęa men a nayanga sakamaya nakikakezeng sakamaya ta su pazazekazekatj.
S.PHON: par…ôpas…ôq…ô éiq…ô éiŇči, u éa m…ôn a najaŇča sakamaja nakikak…ôz…ôŇč sakamaja ta su pazaz…ôkaz…ôkac.
S.FORM: parepaseqeljiqeljingi, ulja men a nayanga sakamaya nakikakezeng sakamaya ta su pazazekazekatj.
S.PHON: par…ôpas…ôq…ô éiq…ô éiŇči, u éa m…ôn a najaŇča sakamaja nakikak…ôz…ôŇč sakamaja ta su pazaz…ôkaz…ôka ¶.
S.TRANSL: let us help one another, let us say, just relying on your commands.

S.FORM: ?aming.
S.PHON: ĒamiŇč.
S.FORM: 'aming.
S.PHON: ĒamiŇč.
S.TRANSL: Amen.

S.FORM: pai tisun a nia Tsemas a ti Yisu-sama, ma…ęima…ęi aravats su kinizangan amen tusa nia sinukuban i tjaiqayaw tjanusun.
S.PHON: pai tisun a nia ¶…ômas a ti jisu-sama, ma éima éi arava ¶ su kinizaŇčan am…ôn tusa nia sinukuban i caiqajaw canusun.
S.FORM: pai tisun a nia Cemas a ti Yisu-sama, maljimalji aravac su kinizangan amen tusa nia sinukuban i tjaiqayaw tjanusun.
S.PHON: pai tisun a nia ¶…ômas a ti jisu-sama, ma éima éi arava ¶ su kinizaŇčan am…ôn tusa nia sinukuban i ¶aiqajaw ¶anusun.
S.TRANSL: Jesus our God, thank you very much for guarding us during our time of worship before you.

S.FORM: pai a su pitsul a su garang a su ki…ęivak a su valisakedan a su rupazekatjan u…ęa su sinipakizangan tjanuamen a mapu…ęat, a marevetjevetjek i Igiris, a tiamen a imaza i Tayuang a selizuk a katsalisian a mapu…ęat.
S.PHON: pai a su pi ¶u…≠ a su garaŇč a su ki éivak a su va…≠isak…ôdan a su rupaz…ôkacan u éa su sinipakizaŇčan canuam…ôn a mapu éat, a mar…ôv…ôc…ôv…ôc…ôk i igiris, a tiam…ôn a imaza i tajuaŇč a s…ô…≠izuk a ka ¶a…≠isian a mapu éat.
S.FORM: pai a su picul a su garang a su kiljivak a su valisakedan a su rupazekatjan ulja su sinipakizangan tjanuamen a mapuljat, a marevetjevetjek i Igiris, a tiamen a imaza i Tayuang a selizuk a kacalisian a mapuljat.
S.PHON: pai a su pi ¶u…≠ a su garaŇč a su ki éivak a su va…≠isak…ôdan a su rupaz…ôka ¶an u éa su sinipakizaŇčan ¶anuam…ôn a mapu éat, a mar…ôv…ô ¶…ôv…ô ¶…ôk i igiris, a tiam…ôn a imaza i tajuaŇč a s…ô…≠izuk a ka ¶a…≠isian a mapu éat.
S.TRANSL: May your power, might, love, concern and forgiveness protect us all, our brothers and sisters in England and us here in Taiwan, all the plainspeople and mountain people.

S.FORM: aitsu a nia kiqaung nia pinaka tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: ai ¶u a nia kiqauŇč nia pinaka canusun a ti jisu-sama.
S.FORM: aicu a nia kiqaung nia pinaka tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: ai ¶u a nia kiqauŇč nia pinaka ¶anusun a ti jisu-sama.
S.TRANSL: We make our prayer through you, Jesus.

S.FORM: ?aming
S.PHON: ĒamiŇč
S.FORM: 'aming
S.PHON: ĒamiŇč
S.TRANSL: Amen.
